results.sql:
CREATE TABLE benchmarks (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  date TEXT,
  time TEXT,
  machine TEXT,
  product TEXT,
  color TEXT,
  de REAL,
  ds INTEGER,
  delta_c REAL,
  status_en TEXT,
  status_tr TEXT,
  benchmark_en TEXT,
  benchmark_tr TEXT,
  diagnosis_en TEXT,
  diagnosis_tr TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
, process_type TEXT DEFAULT 'gravure', delta_h      REAL DEFAULT 0, delta_l      REAL DEFAULT 0, viscosity    REAL, print_speed  REAL, drying_temp  REAL, status TEXT DEFAULT 'active', supersedes_id INTEGER DEFAULT NULL, job_id INTEGER, color_hex TEXT, measurement_seq INTEGER DEFAULT 1, edited_at TEXT, edited_from TEXT, c_5 REAL, c_10 REAL, c_25 REAL, c_50 REAL, c_75 REAL, m_5 REAL, m_10 REAL, m_25 REAL, m_50 REAL, m_75 REAL, y_5 REAL, y_10 REAL, y_25 REAL, y_50 REAL, y_75 REAL, k_5 REAL, k_10 REAL, k_25 REAL, k_50 REAL, k_75 REAL, sctv_5 REAL, sctv_10 REAL, sctv_25 REAL, sctv_50 REAL, sctv_75 REAL)
